raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I received a notification that I had made a purchase from XXXX XXXX with an item ready for pickup in a different city far from where I live. The charge was for {$XXXX}. I immediately contacted Citi to report the fraudulent transaction. Citi promptly locked my credit card and issued a new one. However, despite being a victim of cybercrime, I was later notified that my dispute was resolved without any credit being issued.
